0.text: Two adjacent nodules in the middle lobe of the right lung, largest measuring 4x2 mm

1.text: Another nodule, measuring 4x2 mm, seen laterally at the same level

2.text: Several nodules in the superior segment of the lower lobe, largest measuring 5x3 mm

3.text: Subpleural nodule, measuring 3 mm in diameter, in the superior segment of the left lower lobe
